commands.loot.success.add_or_degree_chan: Successfully added %s draws to player %s. Total draws: %s
info.screen.roleid.custom_pending: Press G to select your class
info.screen.roleid.hide_and_seek_seeker: Find the hiders in the map.
info.screen.roleid.discovery_civilian:
Civilian Faction
Class exclusive to special modes.
info.screen.roleid.civilian:
Civilian Faction
You have no special abilities. Try to survive this journey.
info.screen.roleid.killer:
Killer Faction
You are a regular Killer.
Has basic Killer shop.
Your goal is to eliminate all Civilians.
info.screen.roleid.loose_end:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Start with 1 Knife, 1 Derringer, 1 Crowbar.
Has Jester vision and permanent Speed 3.
Gain shield based on player count on spawn (1 shield per 6 players, max 3).
Outlaws created via Refugee modifier turn off all lights and glow for 5 minutes on spawn.
Kill everyone with your weapons!!!
info.screen.roleid.super_loose_end:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Start with 1 Knife, 1 Patroller Revolver / Infinite Ammo Sniper / Derringer, 1 Crowbar.
Has Jester vision and permanent Speed 2.
Gain 1 Speed per kill (max 10). Also gain time stop or defense vial (stackable).
Can purchase throwing knives.
Appears in special modes.
Kill everyone with your weapons!!!
info.screen.roleid.dirt_id:
Special Faction
Exclusive to Roulette mode.
Independent win condition.
Can see live bullet count.
Eliminate opponents via roulette duels!
info.screen.roleid.vigilante:
Sheriff Faction
Start with a Revolver.
Can purchase Handcuffs.
Killing a Civilian kills you.
Handcuffs: Right-click on other players. Cuffed players have limited movement and cannot left-click interact.
Cuffed players can break free by holding sneak.
info.screen.roleid.elf:
Sheriff Faction
Cannot pick up pistols. Starts with a Bow. Can buy Crossbows, Poison Arrows, Spectral Arrows.
Poison Arrow: Instant kill on hit.
Spectral Arrow: Makes target glow; if shot on a wall, shows number of players in 6-block radius.
Killing a good player kills you.
Drops Revolver on death.
info.screen.roleid.wind_yaose:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Permanently invisible.
Has Wind Elf vision, silent footsteps.
Active ability: Reduces volume of players in range to 5%%.
Can buy Wind Bombs to knock players back.
info.screen.roleid.blood_feudist:
Killer Faction
Appears only in 12+ player games.
Infinite stamina and fake mood.
Gains 100 coins for each player who dies from killing an innocent.
Evolution potion effects toggled via ability key.
1 accidental kill: Permanent Speed 1
2 accidental kills: Permanent Haste 2
3 accidental kills: Instantly gain 150 coins
4 accidental kills: Permanent Speed 2
5 accidental kills: Immune to all negative effects
Shorter Psycho Mode cooldown.
Shop: Crowbar, Lockpick, Psycho Mode only.
info.screen.roleid.delayer:
Killer Faction
Can see camera locations via Task Vision.
Can buy Shears (3 durability, 30s cd) to disable cameras for 90s.
Killing a player adds 20 seconds to game time.
Cannot buy grenades; monitor breaking is cheaper.
When present and game time reaches 1:25, adds 30 seconds (triggers once).
info.screen.roleid.photographer:
Civilian Faction
Can buy Instant Camera and Photo Paper.
Pressing the shutter blinds people in front and reveals invisible players.
Can photograph crime scenes.
Load photo paper by dragging into camera.
Scroll to zoom, Shift to adjust flash/exposure, right-click to shoot.
Photos can be dropped with Q.
Drops photos on death.
info.screen.roleid.avenger:
Civilian Faction
Start with a protected target.
When target dies, gain a Revolver and know the killer's name.
Target could be Good/Neutral/Killer.
If killer is '???', target died from no-source damage or too far away.
info.screen.roleid.conspirator:
Killer Faction
Shop has Death Note to guess classes. Correct guess kills target.
Guessing the Detective's class reveals your position/info.
Shop prices changed; can only buy Note, Knife, Revolver, Lockpick.
Three wrong guesses kill you.
info.screen.roleid.slippery_ghost:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Has Slippery Ghost shop. Passive 50 coins/10s.
Exclusive item - Blank Cartridge: Right-click target to put their gun on 30s cooldown. Invisible when held.
Exclusive item - Smoke Grenade: Right-click throw, creates smoke cloud blinding players inside. Direct hit clears target's sanity. 10s duration. Invisible when held.
Item - Lockpick: Same as Killer.
Sabotage - Blackout: Same as Killer.
info.screen.roleid.bomber:
Killer Faction
Has Bomber shop. Can buy Grenades, Firecrackers, Lockpicks.
Exclusive ability - Bomb: Use ability key to buy a bomb (100 coins), placed in slot 3 by default.
Bomb emits beeping after 5 seconds. Right-click on other players to pass the bomb!
Bomb is invisible to others.
info.screen.roleid.engineer:
Civilian Faction
Spawns bound to Locksmith (Civilian).
Has Engineer shop. Earn coins from tasks.
Can buy Attendant Keys.
Exclusive item - Reinforcement: Reinforces doors (blocks 1 crowbar use). Invisible when held.
Exclusive item - Alarm Trap: Triggers sound if crowbar used. Locks door when installed. Invisible when held.
Exclusive item - Lock: Forces lockpick minigame when picking. 30%% chance to break lockpick/Attendant Key on failure (doesn't block crowbar).
Engineer can crouch + right-click door with Reinforcement to remove items from door.
info.screen.roleid.boxer:
Civilian Faction
Ability: Iron Body. Gain 2.5s invincibility. 2 min cooldown.
Can buy Boxing Gloves. Hits knock back, stun, and put target's items on cooldown.
info.screen.roleid.postman:
Civilian Faction
Can buy Mail. Used to secretly exchange one item with another player. Single use.
info.screen.roleid.detective:
Civilian Faction
Aim at player and press ability key to see their inventory.
View closes if target moves. 60s cooldown.
Continuously sneaking allows sensing nearby movement.
If your class is guessed by Conspirator, you learn their name and location.
info.screen.roleid.stalker:
Killer Faction
Brief Description
Press ability key near players to gain energy (faster with more players).
Full energy grants a Knife. Knives bought in shop can be placed in off-hand.
Phase 2: Can left-click kill with knife. Off-hand knife purchaseable. Right-click charge to lunge at target (main/off-hand cooldowns separate).
Phase 3: Press Q while holding knife to dash. Attack cooldown increases by 10s.

Detailed Description
Phase 1 -- [Cannot buy shop items, only lockpicks]
1. Infinite sprint, 1 shield.
2. Press ability key to absorb energy until Phase 2.

Phase 2
1. Hunting Knife: Get one knife, can buy second for off-hand. Left-click kill, right-click charge (0.1s charge while sneaking). Auto-release if target in front. Main-hand knife goes on cooldown. If off-hand knife not on cooldown, right-click can lunge with it. Cooldown: 10 seconds.
2. Cannot sprint.
Phase 3 Condition: Kill enough players with dagger to charge energy.

Phase 3
Unlock dash. No need to sneak for quick raise. Press Q to dash (along Y axis). 2.5s cooldown. Stalker can only dash on ground.
info.screen.roleid.athlete:
Civilian Faction
Infinite stamina.
Use ability for Speed 4, 100s cooldown.
Can buy Splash Potion of Speed 3 in shop.
info.screen.roleid.admirer:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Has Jester vision, can buy Attendant Keys.
Use ability to peek at highlighted target for energy.
Reach 90 to become Manipulator.
info.screen.roleid.trapper:
Killer Faction
Use ability on ground to set traps (Crouch + Ability Key to switch type).

[Calamity Trap] Hidden trap. Triggers loud sound, reveals target position, briefly restricts movement. Control duration increases with repeated triggers (3s -> 10s -> 25s).

[Tripwire Trap] Visible. Walking through gives Slowness I for 3s. Sprinting through causes tripping: Slowness IV for 5s and stamina drain.
info.screen.roleid.star:
Civilian Faction
Use ability to attract the gaze of all players within 30 blocks and glow for 2 seconds.
Can see how many people are looking.
Each viewer gives 10 coins, max 150 coins.
Can buy Signature Paper. Right-click for normal signature.
Players with normal signature can see Star's position continuously.
Players with signature gain Speed I when Star is in view.
Crouch + right-click to sign Life & Death Pact (once).
Player with pact survives a fatal blow, Star takes damage instead.
info.screen.roleid.veteran:
Civilian Faction
Start with a Saber (same as Knife). Single use, 60s cooldown. Killing a good player causes sanity penalty.
Using the saber triggers Jester's Psycho Mode without consuming a use.
Veterans can buy Sabers in shop.
Saber has special texture for others (different from regular knife), no knife skins.
Veterans cannot left-click knockback with knife.
info.screen.roleid.singer:
Civilian Faction
Can buy 5 types of music discs in shop.
Playing discs provides buffs/debuffs to nearby players:
- Speed I
- 1%% sanity regen per second
- Slowness I
- Mining Fatigue V (effective when Killer enters Psycho Mode)
- Prevents movement (4 block range, does not affect self)
info.screen.roleid.psychologist:
Civilian Faction
With 70+ sanity, aim at a stationary player for 10 seconds to fully restore their sanity.
Passive aura: Provides Low Sanity Resistance II and Sanity Drain Reduction I to players within 4 blocks.
Shop items: Mint Candies (75 coins) and Vitamins (125 coins).
Mint Candies: Restore 35%% sanity. Can be thrown (Q).
Vitamins: Right-click target to apply one random buff, notifies target of effect:
1. Sanity Drain Reduction
2. Sanity Drain Immunity
3. Sanity Regeneration
4. Infinite Stamina
5. Stamina Boost
6. Stamina Recovery Boost
Vitamins can be thrown (Q).
info.screen.roleid.puppeteer:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Has Puppeteer vision.
Brief Description
Right-click corpses to collect. Collect enough to advance phase.
Next phase: Press ability key to release a puppet. If puppet dies, return to body. Puppet is a random Killer class (except Deathrattle Killer).
Puppeteer's body remains while controlling puppet.

Detailed Description
Phase 1 -- Faction: Neutral
1. Right-click corpse to make it disappear and collect. Evolution requires corpses = total players / 6. Corpse collection has 10s cooldown.
2. Puppeteers appear rainbow-colored in Killer vision.

Phase 2
1. Can no longer collect corpses.
2. Use ability to release and control puppet (uses = number of collected corpses).
3. Killer faction: Body cannot use shop while controlling.
4. Puppet death does not kill you; returns to body's perspective (if alive).
5. If Puppeteer body dies while controlling, puppet is cleared and Puppeteer truly dies.
6. Controlling a random corpse changes class to a random Killer class.
7. Puppet control limited to 1 minute, then returns to Phase 2.
8. Switching back to body resets class to Puppeteer.
9. Puppet and body have separate inventories.
10. Puppet creation has cooldown.
info.screen.roleid.better_vigilante:
Civilian Faction
Passive: Last Stand
When only 2 good players remain, gain a Derringer and Grenade, and unlock vision.
Derringer: Refills ammo only on hit, 2s cooldown, no sanity penalty.
info.screen.roleid.best_vigilante:
Sheriff Faction
Easter egg class, 0.1%% spawn chance.
Start with a Grenade.
Only appears in 12+ player games.
Cannot become Red navy except naturally.
info.screen.roleid.baseball_player:
Sheriff Faction
Easter egg class, 1%% spawn chance.
Start with a Bat.
Sanity penalty applies.
Gambler cannot transform into Baseball Player.
info.screen.roleid.creeper:
Killer Faction
Easter egg class, 20%% spawn chance.
Infinite stamina, can only buy Lockpick and Knife (130 coins).
Press ability key to ignite, costing 300 coins. Explodes after 6s, killing self and players within 5 blocks.
info.screen.roleid.writer:
Civilian Faction
Easter egg class, 2%% spawn chance.
Has exclusive shop, can buy Book and Quill.
Signed books can be given to others. Reading a signed book completes the 'read book' task.
Drops books and quill/signed books on death.
info.screen.roleid.telegrapher:
Civilian Faction
Easter egg class, 2%% spawn chance.
Press ability key to open telegraph interface, send anonymous messages to all players.
Max 6 telegrams per game.
Telegrams are voice-broadcasted and shown as titles on all players' screens.
info.screen.roleid.rescuer:
Civilian Faction
Can buy Rope and Body Bag.
Rope: 2 durability. Pulls the nearest player within a 12-block straight line to you. 3s cooldown on use, 5s cooldown on successful pull (consumes 1 durability).
Body Bag: Removes corpses.
info.screen.roleid.firefighter:
Civilian Faction
Can buy Fire Axe and Extinguisher (one each per game).
- Fire Axe: 3 durability. Crouch + right-click door to break it (1 durability). Long press right-click to raise and kill (requires full durability, consumes all 3 durability on kill).
- Extinguisher: Right-click to spray (1 durability per use, can hold for up to 5s).
Sprayed players get Slowness and Blindness (1.5s).
Extinguisher removes Arsonist's gasoline from sprayed players.
info.screen.roleid.awesome_binglus:
Civilian Faction
Start with a Note.
Can see note positions and spend 50 coins to stick a note on someone (right-click other player while holding Note/Giant Note).
Shop: Notes and Giant Notes.
Can see if players within 5 blocks have had someone die near them in the last 30s (darker glow = more recent).
Giant Note: 5x larger note. Can be stuck on players.
info.screen.roleid.bartender:
Civilian Faction
Can temporarily see players who have drunk drinks.
Can see if food/drink is poisoned.
Can see if players are poisoned.
Shop: Defense Vial. Can place on food platter/drink tray. Next player who consumes gains a shield.
Players with Bartender's shield appear with blue outline.
Players with both shield and poison appear with yellow-green outline.
info.screen.roleid.coroner:
Civilian Faction
Can see victim's information (cause of death, time of death). Can detect fake bodies.
Can periodically sense corpses nearby.
info.screen.roleid.doctor:
Civilian Faction
If a Doctor is present, the Killer team will have a Poisoner.
Can sense nearby poisoned players.
Start with a single-use Defibrillator (invisible to others).
Defibrillator: Use on a living player, notifying them. If they die within 120s, they revive after 30s.
Syringe: Cure poisoned players on use. Passes to another Civilian on death.
Pill: Cures poison when consumed. Can be given away.
Purify Bomb: Cures poison for players within 3 blocks.
Can spend 50 coins to buy Antidote Reagent to check if a player is poisoned.
If Doctor is alive, players who died less than 45 seconds ago have restricted Killer Instinct and vision for 45 seconds after death!
info.screen.roleid.noisemaker:
Civilian Faction
Start with a Radio (walkie-talkie). Right-click to enter Broadcaster's radio channel.
Voice transmission distance is greatly increased. Corpse glows and emits loud sound on death.
Use ability to increase voice range 4x.
When ability is active, players within 15 blocks (excluding Noisemaker) glow.
info.screen.roleid.recaller:
Civilian Faction
Use ability to mark a location. Use again (cost 100 coins) to return.
info.screen.roleid.voodoo:
Civilian Faction
Bind a player. If you die (excluding terrain damage), the bound player dies with you. This death ignores shields, invincibility.
§e!!!§r Killing a Voodoo as a Civilian does NOT incur sanity penalty.
§e!!!§r Your own shield prevents Voodoo trigger.
info.screen.roleid.jester:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Start with Fake Revolver and Fake Knife. Has Jester vision. Killing a Jester triggers Psycho Mode (triggered only by Good players, not Killers/Neutrals).
Jester Psycho Mode has unique BGM.
Can buy Delusion Vial. Delusion poison can be triggered by Poisoner's Catalyst.
info.screen.roleid.vulture:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Use ability to consume corpses, erasing info (Coroner sees garbled data).
Need 1 corpse per 6 players.
Consuming corps gives grey particles. Do not eat in public!
Upon reaching required count, transforms into a random Killer.
Inherits 40%% + 100 gold from Vulture.
info.screen.roleid.executioner:
Killer Faction
Cannot buy knives. Guns are very cheap.
Killing with a gun has a chance not to drop the gun.
Start with a locked target (blue highlight, invisible cannot be seen). Gain 50 coins when target dies.
Cannot kill targets other than the current one. Hand grenades also only kill your target.
Can buy Shooting Frenzy: During frenzy, shooting cooldown -50%%, gun doesn't drop, immune to target restriction.
info.screen.roleid.morphling:
Killer Faction
Use ability to change skin -- duration 35 seconds, cooldown 20 seconds.
Can buy Hallucination Bottle, creating a fog that blinds nearby players and forces view changes. Invisible when held.
info.screen.roleid.phantom:
Killer Faction
Use ability to become invisible. Does not hide held items. Has collision hitbox while invisible.
info.screen.roleid.ghost:
Civilian Faction
Cannot be seen by Killer Instinct (but can be seen by some Neutral roles).
Can see remaining game time.
At 3 minutes remaining, unlock ability to become invisible (cost 150 coins). Has collision hitbox while invisible.
When only the Ghost remains, game time fast-forwards to 2 minutes.
info.screen.roleid.gambler:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Draw a class every 30s, press ability key to select.
Can pick up pistols.
Sneak + right-click while holding pistol to suicide and become selected class.
Upon death by others: 33%% become Killer faction, 33%% become Sheriff faction, 33%% die, 1%% win independently.
info.screen.roleid.attendant:
Civilian Faction
Shop: Attendant Key, Iron Door Key, Flashlight, Lantern.
Attendant Key: Opens cabin doors, 5 uses.
Iron Door Key: Opens iron doors, 3 uses.
Flashlight: Right-click to illuminate forward area.
Lantern: Illuminates area when held. Can be given away.
Press ability key to turn on lights within 5 blocks (can turn on during blackout).
See player's room number when aiming at them.
Active - Light On: Ability key turns on lights within 5 blocks regardless of conditions.
info.screen.roleid.swapper:
Killer Faction
Open inventory, select players to swap positions.
2.5s delay during which Swapper cannot move. Cannot swap while falling.
Swapped players receive notification.
info.screen.roleid.conductor:
Civilian Faction
Start with Master Key and Spyglass.
Spyglass: See player names from afar.
Master Key: Unlimited use, opens all doors. Blocked by Engineer's locks. Lockpick failure doesn't consume Master Key. Drops on death.
Shop: Master Key, Screwdriver.
Captain's Screwdriver: Only removes door reinforcements (crouch + right-click door with screwdriver).
info.screen.roleid.the_insane_damned_par:
Killer Faction
Can see dead players' chat.
Use ability to pretend to be a corpse.
Fake corpses can be detected by Coroner. Not invincible while pretending.
Upon death, Deathrattle Killer enters a death-like state.
Crawling onto another corpse revives (once per game).
info.screen.roleid.broadcaster:
Civilian Faction
Start with 200 coins. Spend 50 to broadcast a message to all players. Starts with a Radio.
Can edit broadcast message; saved until sent.
Upon death, saved message is automatically broadcast.
Radio: Right-click to enter radio channel (long-range voice). Can be dropped (Q).
All players are notified of your death.
Can see remaining game time.
info.screen.roleid.manipulator:
Killer Faction
Can control a target player for several seconds.
Controlled player moves randomly and cannot use items.
info.screen.roleid.poisoner:
Killer Faction
If Poisoner is on Killer team, Good team will have a Doctor.
Immune to poison. Can see poisoned players. Can buy Poison Syringe. Poison and Scorpion cheaper.
Poison Syringe: Ranged (15 blocks, 0.25s charge). Right-click to aim. Hit player dies after 30 seconds. Single-use.
Can buy Catalyst: Right-click to instantly kill all poisoned players (including Jester's Delusion).
Toxic Reagent: Right-click on toilet to poison next user.
Fake Pills: Pills from Poisoner's shop are poisonous.
Chlorine Bomb: Poisons players within 3 blocks.
Poison: Can be placed on food platter/drink tray.
Scorpion: Can be placed on beds. Venom spreads to nearby beds.
info.screen.roleid.thief:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Sneak + ability key to cycle modes: Steal Money, Steal Item, Sell Item. Use ability key on player to perform action (30s cooldown, failure doesn't trigger cooldown; Sell has no cooldown).
When gold reaches (total players at start * 55 coins), auto-converts to Gold Ingot.
Steal Money steals 40%% of target's gold (min 100). Target loses that amount.
Steal Item steals a random item from target's inventory (cannot steal letters, food, drinks, civilian pistols).
Sell Item sells held item for 50 coins.
Killing a player grants 200 coins.
Win condition: Hold Gold Ingot and sleep in your bed.
info.screen.roleid.candlebearer:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Only in 12+ player games.
Cannot be seen by Killer vision. Can see players/corpses within 40 blocks.
With Instinct active: Already lit players/bodies yellow. Unlit targets grey. Lit bodies blue.
Brief Description:
Hold candle, right-click live player to light. After they die, right-click their corpse to light.
Each lighting causes target/body to glow after 6 seconds.
Successfully lighting a corpse grants 1 invisibility charge and 1 progress.
Start with 1 invisibility charge. Can buy more in shop.
Win after reaching required progress.

Detailed Description:
Lighting live player causes them and their corpse to glow after 6 seconds.
With Instinct: Lit/affiliated bodies yellow, others grey.
Start with 1 invisibility charge.
Lighting a lit person's corpse grants progress +1 invisibility charge (max 5).
Press ability key to consume 1 charge for 18s invisibility.
Shop: Buy 1 invisibility charge (click to add) for coins. Buy Candle for 50 coins.
Win requirement: Lit corpses = (players/5)+1 (rounded down), min 4.
Each successful lighting causes lighting sound globally after 4 seconds.
1.5s cooldown between lighting live players.
info.screen.roleid.amnesiac:
Neutral Faction
Before transformation, wins with Good players.
Can see nearby corpses.
Must do tasks to maintain sanity before stealing a class.
Right-click corpse to steal its class.
Win condition matches stolen class.
info.screen.roleid.arsonist:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Has Arsonist vision, but only within 40 blocks.
Game does not end while Arsonist is alive.
Brief Description:
Use Jerry Can to douse players with gasoline.
Once enough players doused, Lighter goes on cooldown. Igniting after cooldown does not kill self.
Kill everyone to win.

Detailed Description:
Right-click player with Jerry Can to douse. Right-click with Lighter to ignite.
Igniting with insufficient doused players kills Arsonist.
If Lighter is on cooldown, igniting after cooldown completes does NOT kill Arsonist.
Arsonist appears as Good in Killer Instinct.
Note: Others can see Jerry Can and Lighter.
If everyone is burned, Arsonist wins.
info.screen.roleid.avaricious:
Killer Faction
Start with 50 coins.
Every minute, pickpocket gold from nearby players.
Each player provides a certain amount of gold based on player count and distance.
info.screen.roleid.initiate:
Neutral Faction
Before transformation, wins with Good players. Goal is to become Killer.
Brief Description:
Do tasks to earn coins, buy a knife to kill the other Initiate.
Can only see the other Initiate's position after buying the knife.
Killing the other Initiate transforms you into a Killer.
If the other Initiate dies from non-player causes, become Amnesiac.
If killed by others, become hostile faction.
Killing a non-Initiate player kills you.

Detailed Description:
Two Initiates spawn in 12+ player games. If only one, become Amnesiac after 5s.
Buy Knife (200 coins) to see the other Initiate.
Knife only kills other Initiate. Killing others fails the trial.
Neutral faction, but wins with Good players.
Cannot pick up guns. No sanity penalty if killed by Good.
Successfully killing other Initiate becomes random Killer class.
If other Initiate dies from non-player causes, become Amnesiac.
If killed by Killer, become random Good class.
If killed by Good, become random Killer class.
If killed by Neutral, become random Neutral class.
If game ends with both Initiates alive, both win with Good.
After transformation, win condition matches new class.
info.screen.roleid.necromancer:
Killer Faction
Can revive dead players.
Each Killer death grants 1 revive charge.
Right-click corpse to revive as regular Killer (costs 1 charge, 3 min cooldown).
Cannot buy any items except Lockpick, but has Killer vision.
Reviving plays a totem sound and broadcasts globally.
info.screen.roleid.recorder:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Only in 10+ player games.
Has Recorder vision (20 blocks).
Start with Recording Note to guess classes.
Notebook records all classes/players. Invisible to others.
Guess required number of classes to win.
Too many wrong guesses kills Recorder.
info.screen.roleid.monokuma:
Neutral Faction
Leans win condition.
Only in 10+ player games. Only obtained via Black & White modifier.
Disguised as Vigilante (shows as Vigilante).
Has Monokuma vision. Holds a special revolver (50%% accuracy).
Upon taking damage, enters [Prelude] phase (35 seconds):
  Gain 1 shield, Yin-Yang Sword. All players' movement speed reduced by 20%%.
  Yin-Yang Sword: Right-click to charge 1s for 3.2-block AOE kill (max 2). Q triggers dash.
  Killing total players/7 during frenzy ends it, transforming into [Monokuma].
[Monokuma] Form: Nearly invincible (cannot pick up items), 4-block aura.
  Invincibility prevents normal death, but void, voodoo, etc. still kill.
  Invincibility ends when all Good or all Evil players are dead.
  Outlaws can kill you.
  Aura gives players 8 coins and infinite stamina every 5 seconds.
  When game ends, leans win to faction of nearest living player within 6 blocks.
  If none or nearest is Neutral, loses.
info.screen.roleid.commander:
Neutral Faction
Wins with Killers.
Start with Fake Knife and Fake Revolver.
Active - Switch to Killer channel: Only Killers see/hear your messages.
You also receive Killer messages (but Killers' messages may be seen/heard by nearby players).
Passive - Alertness: When Instinct is on, see Sheriff Faction players within 5 blocks (blue outline).
info.screen.roleid.fortuneteller:
Civilian Faction
Spend money to tell a player's fortune. If they are about to die within 120s, they teleport to you and avoid death.
Goes on cooldown after use.
info.screen.roleid.oldman:
Civilian Faction
Base movement speed slower. No sprinting task required.
Can buy Wheelchair (90s durability). Right-click to place. 20%% chance for easter egg: get indestructible Carrot on a Stick instead (once per game).
Right-click Carrot on a Stick to spawn a saddled pig (once). Drops on death.
Wheelchair can knock other players away.
Press ability key while sitting to return wheelchair to inventory.
info.screen.roleid.mercenary:
Neutral Faction
Special Neutral class (non-independent win).
Only in 12+ player games.
Start with Revolver. Glow continuously and have 2 shields when no contract active.
Contract start removes glow and shields; completion restores and replenishes shields.
Cannot be seen by Killer Instinct; not in Conspirator/Recorder guessable lists.
Can only kill contracted targets or players who break your shield.
Shop: Unsigned Contracts, Temporary Shield, Derringer, Knife, Lockpick.
Unsigned Contract: Mercenary buys, others can right-click to spend 175 coins and choose target.
Others sign and drop; Mercenary right-clicks signed contract to receive payment and see target. Target notified.
Temporary Shield: Buyable during contract. Grants 1 shield, disappears when contract ends.
After killing (total players/10+1) contract targets, can win with either Passenger or Killer faction.
info.screen.roleid.magician:
Civilian Faction
Killers mistake you for a Killer teammate. Randomly impersonate a Killer at game start.
Killers see your role as the impersonated Killer. Killer count shown includes Magician.
All shop items are fake (except Firecracker and Note).
Fake Psycho Mode: Enter Psycho Mode with fake bat (only knocks back). Others do NOT die if they break Magician's Fake Psycho Mode shield. (Magician can swap held items during Fake Psycho Mode).
If Commander present, Magician joins Commander's channel.
info.screen.roleid.bandit:
Killer Faction
Bandit's Killer Instinct only works within 10 blocks (no distance limit for Killer teammates).
Start with Bandit Revolver and Crowbar.
Passive: Steals half of victim's gold on kill.
Bandit Shop: Knife, Bandit Revolver, Grenade, Blackout, Flashbang, Decoy Grenade.
Flashbang: Blind players within 6 blocks looking at impact.
Decoy Grenade: Emits continuous gunshot sounds along throw path.
Cannot buy Psycho Mode, Lockpick, or Crowbar.
info.screen.roleid.cleaner:
Killer Faction
Carries Sulfuric Acid Bucket to dispose of corpses.
Using ability clears dropped items in radius and plays sound.
Can pick up guns but cannot buy Revolver, Psycho Mode, Grenade, or Blackout in shop.
info.screen.roleid.chef:
Civilian Faction
Can buy Pan, Snacks, Water (Snacks/Water can be thrown).
Can temporarily see players who have eaten food.
Each completed task grants 1 ingredient. 2 ingredients + 1 food from platter can be cooked into a meal in the pan (can be thrown).
Meal effects don't show icons but apply.
Cooking minigame: Press A/D to move pan, catch falling ingredients.
Ingredients falling in minigame grant buffs/debuffs:
Buffs: Skip current task, reduce item cooldown, Night Vision, Speed 1, Sanity restore, add coins.
Debuffs: Glowing, Slowness 1, Darkness, Nausea.
Larger ingredients = longer duration (stackable).
Avoid adding Rotten Flesh, Spider Eye, Poisonous Potato, Glow Berries.
info.screen.roleid.clockmaker:
Civilian Faction
Only in 12+ player games.
Can see game time.
Press ability key to spend 125 coins, reduce game time by 45 seconds and speed up world time by 2000 ticks.
Speeding up time reduces cooldowns for everyone.
Immune to any time stop effects.
Game time cannot be reduced below 1 minute 30 seconds.
Shop: Clock (shows world time), Pocket Watch (right-click to see game time, 60s cooldown). Both can be thrown.
info.screen.roleid.wayfarer:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Wayfarer is not a regular passenger. Starts with no key/letter, Fake Knife, Fake Revolver.
Can approach corpses to read additional killer info (affected by Vulture/Arsonist). Then can press ability key (right-click corpse) to activate: transforms Fake Knife into single-use knife, gains corpse's key and letter (trigger once).
Phase 1 - Hunt: Find the killer. Kill them with the single-use knife (shield block counts). Killing the wrong person kills you. (If you have a shield, return to start).
Phase 2 - Exit: After kill, die the same way as the original corpse.
Phase 3 - Dream: Sleep in a bed for independent win.
Tip: Wayfarer does not die immediately after Phase 2 exit; they teleport to the corpse location they used for the ability. Must kill the original killer.
info.screen.roleid.monitor:
Civilian Faction
Use ability key to mark a player and see their position.
Passive - Sense if any player has died in the game. 60s cooldown.
Shop can check passive cooldown.
info.screen.roleid.watcher:
Killer Faction
Default state: Calm. Appears as Good, cannot pick up guns (triggering/killing Good kills you), has 1 single-use shield. Can buy Lockpick and Note.
Tasks grant 25 extra coins.
If a Good player with a gun breaks the shield, the attacker's Revolver drops.
Your shields (including Bartender's) are invisible to Bartender.
Press ability key to switch between Calm and Angry, 60s cooldown.
Angry state: Lose shield, gain Speed I, unlock Killer abilities.
Killing a player in Calm state instantly kills you.
info.screen.roleid.patroller:
Sheriff Faction
When someone dies within 30 blocks of your view, gain a Patroller Revolver and an Attendant Key.
Shop: Can buy Revolver.
Patroller Revolver: Independent cooldown (1/5 of normal), can be held with Revolver.
Attendant Key: Opens any room door, 5 uses.
info.screen.roleid.swast:
Sheriff Faction
Start with Sniper Rifle and 1 Magnum Bullet. Cannot pick up Revolver.
Sanity does not naturally decrease when alone.
Only spawns on specific maps.
Shop: Magnum Bullets, Scope, Iron Door Key.
Sniper Rifle: Left-click to reload (6s). Crouch + left-click to attach Scope (2s).
Without Scope: Right-click fire directly, 4s wait between shots.
With Scope: Crouch + right-click toggle scope. Without crouch, right-click fires directly.
Sniper Rifle only penetrates barriers and barrier panels.
Hitting a player 50+ blocks away ignores shields and kills instantly.
Drops Revolver on death.
info.screen.roleid.martial_arts_instruct:
Sheriff Faction
Start with Nunchaku. Cannot pick up Revolver.
Left-click: Knock nearest player (within 5 blocks) left. Right-click: Knock nearest player right.
Crouch + left-click: Pull player towards you. Crouch + right-click: Push player away.
Same move cannot be used again within 7s.
If target is knocked into a block, next attack kills instantly.
If same target receives 3 hits within 7s, dies instantly.
Nunchaku hits cause Slowness 2 for 1.5s.
Each kill puts Nunchaku on 5s cooldown.
Using Nunchaku 3 times (even without kill) puts it on 5s cooldown.
Drops Revolver on death.
info.screen.roleid.glitch_robot:
Civilian Faction
Has no mood.
Double stamina cap.
Immune to poison.
Glitches every 30 seconds (stunned for 3.5s).
Leaves a glitch current field on death (Slowness 2 for players inside).
Shop: Night Vision Goggles, Glowstone Dust.
Night Vision Goggles can be thrown (Q).
While wearing goggles, buying Glowstone Dust recharges them.
info.screen.roleid.nianshou:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Must do tasks to maintain sanity. 1.5x stamina. Appears as Good in Killer vision.
Passive - Elusive: Gain a Defense Vial (once per game), Speed 2, Night Vision in darkness. Can buy Blackout.
Passive - New Year's Eve: All players get 4 Firecrackers. If Nian Shou has (2/3 total players) Firecrackers within 5 blocks, dies.
Active - Gift Giving: Gain 1 Red Packet every 2 tasks. Use ability on player to give Red Packet; recipient gets 100 coins after 15s.
Passive - Gong Xi Fa Cai: When 5 minutes remain, all alive players get 100 coins and full sanity.
Win Condition: If all Killers are dead and Nian Shou is alive at game end (excluding Gambler/Recorder wins), Nian Shou wins.
info.screen.roleid.accountant:
Civilian Faction
Gain 25 coins every 60s.
Crouch + ability key to switch mode: Income/Expense.
Press ability key directly (cost 175 coins) to use current mode.
Income: Check if a player has >300 coins saved. Get notification if true.
Expense: Mark a player. After 20s, learn if their coins increased/decreased (+ notification if change >100 coins).
Shop: Can buy Passbook (once) for 100 coins.
Right-click Passbook: Deposit coins (max 300). Right-click again: withdraw coins and consume Passbook.
Passbook can be thrown. Drops to nearby Good player on death.
info.screen.roleid.alchemist:
Civilian Faction
Crouch for 20 seconds to gain 1 Alchemy Material.
Crouch + ability key to cycle potion selections.
Press ability key to craft selected potion (cost: 1 material + coins).
Each potion can be crafted twice. Resets at game end.
Potion List:
1. Adrenaline (100 coins): Increase target's stamina cap.
2. Antibiotic (100 coins): Cure target's poison.
3. He Ding Hong (200 coins): Poison target.
4. Gou Pi Gao Yao (150 coins): Prevent target's sanity loss for 30s.
info.screen.roleid.exampler:
Killer Faction
Spawns bound to Cirno (Civilian).
Active 1 - Exam:
Spend 100 coins, select a player, force them to take an exam. You must also complete the exam.
Target can spend 100 coins to avoid death.
Active 2 - Everyone Study:
All players start taking exams. Activate with ability key, cost coins. 240s cooldown.
Both skills share cooldown.
Each player killed via forced exam gives 1 energy.
At 3 energy, gain a Psycho Mode Ticket. Energy resets.
Psycho Mode Ticket can be redeemed for Psycho Mode in shop.
info.screen.roleid.dio:
Killer Faction
Occupies 2 Killer slots. Spawns bound to Jotaro (Sheriff). Spontaneously combusts during day.
Shop: Throwing Knives, Blackout, Lockpick.
Throwing Knife: Q or right-click charge to throw. Ranged weapon.
Active - Time Stop: 10s duration, 15s cooldown. Unlocked by consuming corpses.
During time stop, most other players cannot move or use items. Killing someone during time stop also puts you into time stop for the duration.
Clockmaker and Maid Sakuya can move during time stop.
Special Passive
Final Carnival
Unlocked after consuming several corpses.
Upon taking damage, become immune to death, gain 30s temporary life.
Taking another hit during this period kills you immediately.
Consuming another corpse extends temporary life by 30s.
While active: Speed +30%%.
info.screen.roleid.jojo:
Sheriff Faction
Spawns bound to Dio (Killer).
Special Skill
Star Platinum: The World: 3s time stop, 240s cooldown. Killing during time stop also puts you into time stop.
Passive: Gun cooldown doubled.
Star Platinum allows opening all doors.
Ripple Badge: Charge at least 2s, then punch, knocking back nearby players and dashing forward.
Dashing into target kills. Small sanity penalty. 30s cooldown.
Does not start with a gun. Time stops do not stack/override.
If Dio is within 3 blocks, see him highlighted.
Drops Revolver on death.
info.screen.roleid.locksmith:
Civilian Faction
Spawns bound to Engineer (Civilian).
Can buy Screwdriver, Key Blanks, Paperclips.
Passive - Inspiration: Observe any door within 4 blocks for 10s to gain 1 Inspiration (max 18).
Screwdriver: Repairs doors broken by crowbar. Invisible when held.
Crouch + right-click door with screwdriver to reset and drop installed items (works when door is locked by lockpick).
Key Blank: Right-click to start key forging minigame. Fixed 5 attempts. Costs Inspiration (2/3/4/7/8/9 depending on difficulty).
Possible rewards (difficulty order): Attendant Key, Iron Door Key, Crowbar, Master Key, Lockpick, Artisan Key.
Consumes 1 Key Blank regardless of success/failure.
Paperclip: Single-use door opener (cannot open lockpick-reinforced doors). Can be thrown.
Artisan Key: Opens doors ignoring installed items or lockpick locks. Does not destroy Engineer's reinforcements. Does not drop on death.
Locksmith's Lockpick and Artisan Key pass to nearby Good player on death.
info.screen.roleid.hoan_meirin:
Sheriff Faction
Easter egg, only spawns on maps where jumping is possible.
Press ability key to gain Levitation II for up to 10s. 60s cooldown. Can press again to cancel.
Can punch with fists (left-click).
Punching same player 5 times kills. Small sanity penalty.
Shield from Bartender is 'Aura Shield'. Aura Shield knockbacks nearby players when broken.
Passive - Fear of Loneliness: If no players within 5 blocks, die after 60s.
info.screen.roleid.ma_chen_xu:
Killer Faction
Spawns only on specific maps. Occupies 2 Killer slots. Becomes a tourist after death.
Skills do not affect teammates (including Magician).
Role: Area Denial, Sanity Destroyer, Psychological Tormentor

Fear Field (Passive)
Good players in range lose SAN every 5s.
When target SAN < 30, range increases by 4 blocks, SAN drain doubles.
During Underworld, Fear becomes map-wide.

Soul Devour (Left Click)
Only usable on Good players with SAN ≤ 10. Kill prevents resurrection, removes all items.
Gain 50 coins, Good players in range lose 10 SAN.

Underworld · Hundred Demons Parade (Ultimate, unlocks Phase 3)
Phase 3: Cost 150 coins, lasts 45s. Phase 4: First use free, lasts 60s.
Ma Chen Xu: Invincible, Speed III, Invisible. All Good players lose 5 SAN every 2s.
Left-click marks Good player. After Underworld ends, marked dies (cannot revive).
Good players gain Speed II and Underworld Erosion effect.
All players briefly glow every 15s (expose position). Dark mist surrounds Ma Chen Xu.
Marked players glow permanently.
3+ marks: +300 coins, permanent +10%% movement speed.
2 marks: +200 coins, advance phase immediately.
1 mark: +100 coins, reduce Ult CD by 30s.

Phase 1: Initial Apparition
Fear Range: 15 blocks, -2 SAN/5s. Start 50 coins.
Evolution: Accumulate 100 SAN loss.

Phase 2: Haunting Specter
Fear Range: 20 blocks, -3 SAN/5s. +10%% movement speed. Gain 1 Ghost Art.
Evolution: Accumulate 250 SAN loss.

Phase 3: Fierce Domain
Fear Range: 25 blocks, -5 SAN/5s. Gain 1 Ghost Art. Unlock Ult.
Evolution: Accumulate 500 SAN loss.

Phase 4: Terror Incarnate
Fear Range: 30 blocks, -7 SAN/5s. Gain 1 Ghost Art. Permanent Shield.
Accumulate 800 SAN to trigger Ult automatically once for free.
Phase 4 Underworld Exclusive: Swift Wind (Speed III, +60%% movement speed, 10s).

Ghost Art Pool (1 random unlocked at each Phase 2/3/4)
Ghost Wall: Deploy invisible wall 3 blocks forward for 5s. Crossing knocks back and -15 SAN. 30s CD.
    Underworld Enhanced: 8s duration, knocks back and -25 SAN.
Echo: Record a location. Teleport back within 5s. 45s CD.
Trapping: Place invisible trap. Triggers stun for 3s and -25 SAN. Max 2, 20s CD.
    Underworld Enhanced: 5s stun, -40 SAN.
Parasite: Target stationary player, plant ghost seed. Dies after 60s (30s in Underworld). 90s CD.
Vanish: Invisible for 8s, release smoke particles to confuse. 45s CD.
    Underworld Enhanced: Invisible for 12s.

Shop Items
Chamber · Turbid Rain (100 coins): Light rain for 30s. Good players outside Fear Range lose 3 SAN/5s.
Chamber · Soul Bell (150 coins): 20-block AoE, Good players get 10s tinnitus effect.
info.screen.roleid.sea_king:
Sheriff Faction
Only spawns on underwater maps.
Infinite stamina.
Start with Loyalty 3 Trident. Cannot pick up Revolver.
Trident only returns on player hit. Disappears if hits block.
Natural Water Breathing, gain Dolphin's Grace in water.
Skill: Press ability key to bind and glow players in water within a 20-block sphere for 5s.
Shop: Spend 150 coins for extra Trident. Hitting with it kills.
Drops Revolver on death.
info.screen.roleid.water_ghost:
Killer Faction
Only spawns on underwater maps.
Natural Water Breathing.
Start with Riptide 2 Trident.
Only kills via Trident dash.
Skill: Press ability key to gain Dolphin's Grace 1 for 10s, 40s cooldown.
Passive: Killing with Trident puts it on 30s cooldown.
Shop: Lockpick, Rain.
Passive: Water Ghost dies of dehydration after 35s on land!
Drops Revolver on death.
info.screen.roleid.guest_ghost:
Sheriff Faction
Only spawns on specific maps, bound to Ma Chen Xu.
Start with 100 coins and a Revolver.

Clear Rain Talisman (Active, 35s CD)
Prevents Ma Chen Xu from using Soul Devour for 10s.

Pray for Clear
Unlock condition: Ma Chen Xu has used Underworld.
Effect: Immediately end Underworld, all Good players recover 20 SAN.
Shop: Peachwood Nails.
Peachwood Nails put Ma Chen Xu's Ghost Arts on cooldown for 30s.
info.screen.roleid.diver:
Civilian Faction
Only spawns on underwater maps.
Infinite stamina.
Natural Water Breathing.
Shop: Diving Helmet (provides Water Breathing and Dolphin's Grace 1, can be thrown), Diving Boots (Depth Strider 3).
Press ability key to remove equipment.
info.screen.roleid.ninja:
Killer Faction
Start with a Lockpick.
Shop: Kunai, Shuriken, Blackout.
Ninja's Blackout has shorter cooldown and duration.
Kunai: Melee, silent, single-use.
Shuriken: Ranged, silent, single-use.
Killing in darkness grants +100 coins.
Using block (parry) ability gives 2.5s shield against one hit.
info.screen.roleid.baka:
Civilian Faction
Spawns bound to Exampler (Killer).
Immune to Exampler's forced exam death.
Can close Exampler's exam UI, but still suffers sanity penalty.
Shop: Spend 100 coins for Problem Set.
Right-click to start exam. Completing all problems rewards 200 coins. Failure reduces sanity by 30%%.
Can throw Problem Set to others.
Others completing it gain 100 coins. Failure kills them instantly!
info.screen.roleid.maid_sakuya:
Civilian Faction
Can buy Throwing Knives (Q to throw).
Cannot damage Flandre or Remilia.
Can buy Jūyon Ya at high price. Drink for Speed 10, 20s.
Spell Card: Illusion World 「The World」
Press ability key to activate 5s time stop. Killing during time stop also puts you into time stop.
info.screen.roleid.pachuri:
Civilian Faction
When Flandre is present, max 2 of this class.
Can buy §d§lPachuri Knowledge Book§r.
Gain class of one random player (excluding dead). Recorded in book. Notified player.
Can see Flandre within 5 blocks and restrict their movement (Slowness III).
info.screen.roleid.furandoru:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Spawns bound to Patchouli. Cannot be damaged by Patchouli.
Win condition: Be the last player alive, or survive until timer ends.
Ability: Power to destroy everything. Start with Crowbar (10s CD).
Passive 1: See Patchouli. Also seen by Patchouli within 5 blocks. Inside Patchouli's range: movement restricted (Slowness III, cannot use items, invisible).
Passive 2: When only you and one other faction (excluding Neutral) remain, time shortened to 90s, you glow for 60s.
Passive 3: Cannot be seen by regular Killer vision for a certain time.
Passive 4: Cannot damage Remilia, Maid Sakuya, Patchouli. Cannot be damaged by Patchouli.
Can buy Knife, Fake Revolver, Body Bag, Derringer, Blackout, Wind Bomb.
info.screen.roleid.remilia:
Killer Faction
As Flandre's sister, cannot damage Flandre.
Active: Ability to manipulate fate. Right-click player corpse to randomly modify their cause of death and role (no cooldown).
Passive: When Patchouli or Flandre within 5 blocks, see them highlighted.
info.screen.roleid.imitator:
Killer Faction
Press G on living player to copy skill (temporary skill, max 3 uses, 60s copy cooldown).
Right-click corpse to devour and gain permanent skill.
Max 3 slots. Crouch + G to switch slots.
Only copy skills from: Star / Recaller / Veteran / Broadcaster / Telegrapher / Athlete / Boxer / Ghost.
All skill cooldowns unified to 90s (except copied skills).
New temporary skill overwrites old temporary. If 3 slots full, devouring corpse overwrites oldest slot.
info.screen.roleid.the_fool:
Civilian Faction
Start with Executioner Pistol.
Fool can buy Honored Note (right-click wall).
Other players press J near note to pray to join Tarot Club.
Fool can press G to summon Tarot Club (6 min cooldown if alive, 8 min if dead).
Tarot Club lasts 60s. Fool can press G again to end voting early.
Members press J to join or open vote UI.
All attendees vote for any non-Fool player (including dead).
Tie, no votes, or highest voter dead: Fool gains single-use pistol.
If top voter alive, they are marked as Heretic after vote. Fool is immune to one hit from Heretic.
Executioner Pistol only executes current Heretic. Miss does nothing.
Spirit Cloak: 5s invincibility, cannot attack.
info.screen.roleid.cat_necromancer:
Killer Faction
Easter egg, 10%% spawn chance.
Legend says biantwin's successor.
Right-click player corpse to revive a temporary Killer (Cat Killer).
Cat Killer immediately enters Psycho Mode, dies when Psycho Mode ends.
Cannot buy Killer items except Lockpick.
info.screen.roleid.cat_killer:
Killer Faction
Easter egg.
Only spawned by Cat Necromancer or transformed by Gambler/Initiate, etc.
Immediately enters Psycho Mode on spawn, dies when Psycho Mode ends.
Cannot buy Killer items except Lockpick.
info.screen.roleid.party_killer:
Killer Faction
Click player avatar to give Helium Voice effect.
Party Killer plays party sound from skill location 6s after use.
Helium Voice lasts 4 minutes, 35s cooldown.
Each transformed player adds 1 stack. At target = (start players /5, min 3), automatically trigger Party Time.
Party Time launches a firework rocket from everyone, refreshes cooldowns of all Killer items.
Party Time gives 60 coins to all other Killers, 125 coins to Party Killer.
info.screen.roleid.guard:
Sheriff Faction
Start with Riot Shield and Baton. Shop: Remote Monitoring Terminal.
Remote Monitoring Terminal: Right-click monitor console to bind. Right-click again to view monitor anytime.
Riot Shield: Press ability key to move to off-hand (right-click to return). Blocks one frontal attack, then disappears.
Riot Shield blocks: Revolver / Knife / Derringer / Bat / Bow / Trident.
Baton: 4 durability. Each hit stuns target for 1s and knockback. Two hits within 4 seconds kills. Killing puts Baton on cooldown.
While holding Baton, cannot pick up Revolver/Patroller Revolver.
On death, Baton drops as Revolver.
info.screen.roleid.cuckoo:
Neutral Faction
Independent win condition.
Can buy Lockpick at higher price in shop.
Can enable Instinct, but only sees own eggs, not players.
Press ability key to lay egg (20s cooldown, max eggs = win requirement + 2).
Cannot lay egg within 10 blocks (Y-axis 3) of another egg.
Other players can break eggs by sneaking and looking at them within 3 blocks.
If at game end, number of eggs >= total players * 3/8 -1 (min 4) and Cuckoo is alive, Cuckoo wins (priority higher than Arsonist/Nian Shou, lower than other independent neutrals).
info.screen.roleid.pilot:
Civilian Faction
Spawns bound to Shadow Falcon (Killer).
Only spawns on sky maps.
Pilot can buy Jetpack, Elytra, Firework Rockets. Press ability key to remove Jetpack/Elytra.
Crouch to activate Jetpack (Levitation effect). Dissapears when durability depletes (60 durability). Can be thrown (Q).
Pilot gains Levitation 5, others gain Levitation 1 (except Shadow Falcon).
info.screen.roleid.shadow_falcon:
Killer Faction
Spawns bound to Pilot (Civilian).
Only spawns on sky maps.
Start with Jetpack (using doesn't consume durability, stronger propulsion).
Crouch + ability key to remove Jetpack/Elytra.
Active - Predation:
60s initial cooldown. During skill, gain 1 temporary shield while airborne (disappears on land, doesn't replenish). Shield removed at skill end.
Skill end triggers 240s cooldown.
Passive - Nourish:
On Shadow Falcon death, all alive Killers get a Jetpack.
Shop: Knife, Throwing Knife, Grenade, Crowbar, Lockpick, Jump Boost 2, Elytra (includes 10 Firework Rockets).
info.screen.roleid.spellbreaker:
Killer Faction
Press G to deploy Breaker Field: Non-Killer players within 50m cannot use skills or open inventory for 20s, gain Fairyland Filter.
Breaker Potion: Use on player to make their next skill attempt fail and block skills for 30s (45s effective duration).
Silence Totem: Throw invisible totem. Non-Killer players within 6m get Slowness I and Blindness for 30s. Only one can exist at a time.
info.screen.roleid.meatball:
Passenger Faction
Sanity drains slower.
Killers/Neutrals can only kill you when alone with you (no other Good players within 4 blocks).
Meatball is NOT immune to: Good killing Good by accident / being killed by Good / no-source damage / Bomber's bomb / poison / Conspiracy Page.
Each task adds 40 coins to bounty.
Killer who kills Meatball gets the bounty.
Avoid regaining sanity via tasks.
info.screen.roleid.mortician:
Civilian Faction
See item drops within 10 blocks.
Open corpse inventory and take up to 2 items.
240s cooldown.
info.screen.roleid.builder:
Civilian Faction
Press G to build a client-side wall (4 long, 3 high, 1 thick) at your position. Wall disappears after 60s.
Sneak+G to switch between Build/Demolish mode.
Build Mode: Press G to build a wall, 100s cooldown, 120s initial cooldown.
Demolish Mode: Press G to demolish the most recent wall, no cooldown.
Sneak+G to switch modes is not affected by cooldown.
info.screen.roleid.painter:
Civilian Faction
Start with a Drawing Board.
Skill 1 - Artistic Inspiration: Gain a Drawing Board when triggering one of these events (each event only triggers once):
- Pick up photographs dropped by the Photographer
- Pick up a Revolver/Patroller Revolver from the ground
- Sit still for 40 seconds
Skill 2 - Quest for Inspiration: Gain a Drawing Board every 4 minutes.
Skill 3 - Close Friends: When both Painter and Writer are present on the field, both gain a Drawing Board.
info.screen.modifier.lovers:
Modifier
You are bound to another random player as Lovers (assignment ignores factions).
If one Lover dies, the other dies of a broken heart.
If only you and your Lover survive, Lovers win.
To achieve win condition, you may kill your teammates (specifically Killer faction).
If your Lover is an Outlaw, you may not revive if they die during Outlaw moment (as you die after them).
info.screen.modifier.refugee:
Modifier
Player with Refugee modifier revives as an Outlaw 120 seconds after death, entering Outlaw Moment.
As an Outlaw, kill all other players to win.
If killed as Outlaw, game time/inventory/coins/sanity revert to the moment of Outlaw revival.
- Note: Only above states are restored; others may be cleared/overwritten!
- Example: Arsonist fire count, Puppeteer corpse count, etc.
All players killed during Outlaw Moment revive.
During Outlaw Moment, some class/modifier active/passive abilities are disabled.
Examples:
- Deathrattle Killer corpse play/revive immunity, Necromancer revive, Avenger revenge, Admirer observation, Vulture corpse eating
- Puppeteer corpse eating, Initiate transformation, Amnesiac corpse selection, Split Personality active switch (passive still active)
- Wayfarer phase advancement (except win), Stalker phase advancement, Thief skills, Patroller passive
info.screen.modifier.feather:
Modifier
You have no collision hitbox.
info.screen.modifier.taskmaster:
Modifier
Killer/Neutral/Civilian players gain extra coins for completing tasks.
info.screen.modifier.jeb_:
Modifier
Others cannot see your name.
Every 5 seconds, you randomly change to another player's skin.
info.screen.modifier.allergist:
Modifier
When player eats/drinks, one of these effects triggers randomly:
33%% nothing, 33%% immune to poison once, 33%% gain Speed 2, 1%% death.
info.screen.modifier.cursed:
Modifier
Gain random potion effects every 30s.
On death, this modifier passes to your killer.
info.screen.modifier.secretive:
Modifier
Others cannot gain information from your corpse.
info.screen.modifier.knight:
Modifier
When in darkness, chance to teleport to another player's location.
info.screen.modifier.black_white:
Modifier
Your class becomes Monokuma upon gaining this modifier.
See Monokuma class description for details.
info.screen.modifier.tnt_tagged:
Modifier exclusive to Hot Potato mode.
Marks the player holding the potato.
info.screen.modifier.split_personality:
Modifier
Two souls share one body. Switch personalities every 60s or actively with key.
Default = first personality's skin.
Other personality hears and sees current personality's perspective.
When body dies, both personalities choose 'Deceive' or 'Sacrifice'.
If both choose 'Deceive', body dies instantly.
If one 'Deceive' one 'Sacrifice', 'Deceive' revives, 'Sacrifice' dies.
If both choose 'Sacrifice', both revive but live only 60s, retain inventory.
§c§lIf you die during Outlaw Moment, you will not revive.§r
info.screen.modifier.expedition:
Modifier
When only 2 Good players remain, your class switches to Red Navy.
Only affects Civilian faction.
info.screen.modifier.vigorous:
Modifier
You have more stamina cap, stamina recovers faster when not sprinting.
info.screen.modifier.unyielding:
Modifier
If Civilian: Survive one accidental kill by a Civilian.

info.screen.roleid.dnf_killer:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Has independent blood system.
Automatically gains Throwing Knife and Crowbar at night.
Can spend blood to buy Throwing Knife and Lockpick.
Press skill key (G by default) to request aid.
Gain blood by consuming corpses, 10 blood per corpse.
Achieve personal ending win after accumulating enough blood.
Unlock personal ending after consuming enough corpses.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_soldier:
Sheriff Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Armed force of the Civilian faction.
Start with Baton and Revolver.
Win by killing all Killers.
Max 2 Soldiers at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_chef:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Responsible for cooking food for passengers.
Can turn ingredients (cornmeal, flour, suspicious meat) into rations.
Press skill key (G by default) to process corpses (consumes capacity).
Starts with Chef Hat.
Has daily cooking capacity limit.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_psychologist:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Maintains mental health of passengers.
Restores others' sanity through:
- Cleaning spider webs in the library
- Giving lectures at the podium
- Using the toilet
- Cleaning dust in the prison
info.screen.roleid.dnf_locksmith:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Skilled in lockpicking.
Can use Lockpicks to open locked carriage doors.
Can also repair broken door locks (right-click door).
Max 4 Locksmiths at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_civilian:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
No special abilities.
Need to survive until all Killers are dead.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_maniac:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Hidden helper of the Killers.
Can kill players at night.
Kills are recorded.
Max 2 at a time.
Stunned (but not killed) by gunshots.
No penalty for killing Killer faction players.
Can help Killers win.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_poisoner:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Can poison food.
Press skill key (G by default) to use poison.
Gains Toxic Heart for killing poisoned players.
Each Toxic Heart increases an extra kill count.
Can unlock special abilities via a book in the Underworld.
Max 1 at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_abyss:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Can forcibly send targets to the Underworld using Abyss Tentacle.
Hold use key to charge and release area attack.
Hit targets get Slowness.
Gains invisibility and speed continuously.
Cannot move while charging.
Max 2 at a time.
Start with Abyss Tentacle.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_ghost:
Ghost Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Special class allowing continued gameplay after death.
Gains Ghost State effect, can phase through terrain.
Can see all players' positions after death.
Can interact with living players.
